benchmarks.name: BigCodeBench Complete
benchmarks.description: 1140 code-completion tasks with complex library calls. Pass@1.

benchmarks.name: FrontierCode
benchmarks.description: Cognition FrontierCode agentic coding eval (Diamond subset). Reported at medium/high effort.

benchmarks.name: LiveCodeBench
benchmarks.description: Contamination-free coding benchmark from live competitive programming contests.

benchmarks.name: MBPP+
benchmarks.description: MBPP with stricter test suite. Pass@1.

benchmarks.name: MultiPL-E HumanEval
benchmarks.description: MultiPL-E HumanEval multilingual code generation benchmark.

benchmarks.name: MultiPL-E MBPP
benchmarks.description: MultiPL-E MBPP multilingual code generation benchmark.

benchmarks.name: QwenWebBench
benchmarks.description: Internal front-end code-generation benchmark; bilingual, 7 categories; auto-render + multimodal judge; BT/Elo rating.

benchmarks.name: SciCode
benchmarks.description: Scientific code-generation benchmark drawn from real research problems.

benchmarks.name: Spider
benchmarks.description: Text-to-SQL benchmark ??generate SQL queries from natural-language questions over databases.
